description: Deprecated compatibility alias for session_label. Add or remove one label on sessions selected by selector. Mutations use key=value to set and key- to remove.

mutation.description: Label mutation as key=value or key-.

selector.description:
Session selector used for matching sessions to label.

Grammar:
  all
  <uuid>
  id:<uuid>
  role:<name>
  namespace:<slug>
  dir:<path>
  label:<key>=<value>
  label:<key> in (v1, v2)
Examples:
  all
  019e44f9-...
  role:engineer
  namespace:default
  dir:/tmp/project
  label:app=nginx
  "label:app in (web, api)"

name: agent_label
